description: ORDER BY with a CASE expression does not affect return types
name: order_by_case_expression
query_sql:
-- @name ListUsersByStatusPriority
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, name, status FROM users ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, name
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active');
